evals.name: lead-magnet-flow
evals.prompt: Design a lead magnet and follow-up ask that creates goodwill without making users feel trapped or indebted.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: free-consultation-audit
evals.prompt: Review this free-consultation funnel for reciprocity pressure and suggest cleaner alternatives.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
